user.title: Set up IR Blaster
user.description: Connect your Tasmota IR blaster to Home Assistant via MQTT.

data_description.device_name: Friendly name for this IR blaster (e.g. Living Room IR)
data_description.mqtt_topic: The Tasmota Topic set in Configuration > Configure MQTT (e.g. Irblaster)

abort.already_configured: This IR blaster topic is already configured.
